title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: FLORENCE WARMING CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below or 38 degrees with wind and rain. Also serves dinner and breakfast. Location of shelter depends on day of the week. 87738 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Pets allowed on leash or in crates. Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-8am when activated for cold weather. Location of shelter depends on day of the week. Friday-Sunday: Presbyterian Community Church, 3996 Highway 101, Florence, 97439 Monday-Tuesday: Florence Unitarian Universalist Fellowship, 87738 Highway 101, Florence, 97439 Wednesday-Thursday: TBD Email (541) 393-8552 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 393-8552 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call or visit website to confirm location. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Florence TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Location of shelter depends on day of the week. Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
